blocks.text: Champions League night — four ties, two are still alive
A Norwegian club stole the show in Milan last night. Now PSG must protect a 3-2 aggregate lead against Monaco — one away goal and the tie flips completely.

blocks.label: ⚽ CL Wednesday — also on
items: 18:45 — Atalanta vs Dortmund — Dortmund 2-0 up on aggregate, advancing barring disaster
21:00 — Juventus vs Galatasaray — Juve's four-goal cushion makes this a formality
